The truth is full of rough texture: this is a very typical '13-Employee Suburban Assembly Workshop & Igniter Subcontractor.' They don't do microelectronics R&D; instead, using manual or semi-automatic equipment, they process metal and ceramic accessories to assemble 'electronic igniters' used in gas stoves or industrial kilns.
